{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322034100729884F205049154880A"}"},"total":3434},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7595226016513327897","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常推荐，不同于一般无敌文的幽默感，在有爽感的同时也有笑点，主角的清醒与疯癫切换与故事情节没有冲突，自由切换也毫不违和，几个配角的内心戏也很有深度，刻画的都栩栩如生，有着自身的特色，看了将近一年，时有不看，但一段时间不看后也别有一番感觉，特别是看完一次后许久，又重头看，确是不错，符合我的胃口，希望作者可以更新完","text_exts":[{"e":82,"s":78,"text":"栩栩如生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%A0%A9%E6%A0%A9%E5%A6%82%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741220609154880A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227595226016513327897%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227436220563376311320%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%A0%A9%E6%A0%A9%E5%A6%82%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768403577,"group_id":"7436220563376311320","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"永远比你多一份自信。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7e0jQ3Z1+0Uj+Ua+xKXSqw=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9253c0d755e9463bb41fd35f7e0b987a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776700818&x-signature=ekVPdElbXFfQhPduQ5f%2Bjxk2NUM%3D","user_id":"769283600168302","user_name":"泪之梦殇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"769283600168302","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1661605641,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7436220563376311320","book_info":{"abstract":"陈寻，一个背着木剑的青衣书生。
一个在疯癫和清醒之间来回摆渡的岁月旅人。
陈寻漂泊在世，每疯癫三年，便会清醒，如此往复，轮回不止，无人知晓他何处来，亦无人知晓他何处去。
陈寻背负的…是上古的诅咒？还是自囚的修行？亦或者是一场挣脱不得的命劫枷锁？
岁月旅途中，有人轻嘲木剑，却不知，青衣书生的剑下，亡魂千千万，白骨遍八荒！
